message:
fix: add runtime validation for connect, addGroup, addFrame, message

Prevent silently broken diagrams by validating IDs at call time:
- connect(): from/to must be node IDs (not groups/frames)
- addGroup(): children must be existing node or group IDs
- addFrame(): children must be existing node or group IDs, no nested frames
- removeGroup/removeFrame(): throw if ID doesn't exist
- message(): from/to must be actor IDs
